stemHtml: An aircraft enters a holding pattern at 15:40 UTC and the ATC clears the pilot to exit the holding and commence the approach for landing at 15:46 UTC. If 4 minutes are needed to complete one holding pattern, how should you proceed?

options.a: Leave the holding and tell ATC you are going to fly a visual approach on a direct heading.
options.b: Adjust the holding within the safe limits in order to stay in the protected zone.
options.d: Fly a 6 minute holding to stay within the safe zone.
